entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: PRE-HARVEST AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A serious quality concern in groundnut caused by fungal infection.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress that exacerbates pre-harvest aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: HOST-PATHOGEN INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the groundnut plant and the Aspergillus flavus fungus.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO PAC
entities.description: The ability of certain groundnut genotypes to resist pre-harvest aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for aflatoxin contamination in groundnut.

entities.name: RNA-SEQ ANALYSIS
entities.description: The method used for genome-wide transcriptome profiling.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR
entities.description: Proteins that regulate the transcription of genes.

entities.name: BHLH
entities.description: A family of transcription factors identified in the study.

entities.name: MYB-RELATED
entities.description: A family of transcription factors identified in the study.

entities.name: NAC
entities.description: A family of transcription factors identified in the study.

entities.name: FAR1 FAMILY PROTEIN
entities.description: A family of transcription factors identified in the study.

entities.name: SENESCENCE-ASSOCIATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Defense-related genes differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: RESVERATROL SYNTHASE
entities.description: Defense-related gene differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: SEED LINOLEATE
entities.description: Defense-related gene differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: PATHOGENESIS-RELATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Defense-related genes differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: PEROXIDASES

entities.name: GLUTATHIONE-S-TRANSFERASES
entities.description: Defense-related genes differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: CHALCONE SYNTHASE
entities.description: Defense-related gene differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: ABA-RESPONSIVE GENE
entities.description: Genes that respond to abscisic acid, differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: CHITINASES
entities.description: Defense-related genes differentially expressed in resistant genotypes.

entities.name: ABR17
entities.description: An ABA-responsive gene that co-regulates genes during drought stress and provides resistance against A. flavus.

entities.name: PR-10 CLASS
entities.description: A class of proteins to which ABR17 belongs.
